name: clouseau-log-viewer
description: Clouseau Log Viewer – desktop Log4j2 log viewer (offline) with open, tail, paste, search, export

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
